Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can see myself sleeping in bed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Door unlocked in 92 seconds... My time has improved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Surface body temperature reads... 36.2 degrees Celsius... No fever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}At this rate, he should make a full recovery by morning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The pillow I prepared in the freezer will not be necessary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}...I cannot stay too long, or Yukari-san will reprimand me again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There are still four hours and twelve minutes until sunrise...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I should be safe as long as I sneak out before morning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I... will keep watch over him for a little longer...[n]{f 1 1}
